'''Vork''' was the [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] of the [[Gorph/Legends|Gorph's]] tribe on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], and son of [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Slugga]]. He, at one time, intended to marry the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], believing her to be a [[Prince/Legends|princess]].

{{Char-stub}}
